憧れの人はあなた: The One I Admire Is You
今日はお仕事の日ね。<br>でもわたしみたいなお婆ちゃん、選ばれるのかしら？: Today is my work day. But will an old woman like me really be chosen?
はい。お客様の部屋へどうぞ。: Yes. Please go to the client's room.
わたしを指名するなんて、誰なのかしら……？: Who would request someone like me...? I wonder.
――トントン: A knock came at the door.
フィルムが室内に入ると、待機していた大柄な兵士が目を輝かせた。<br>その姿に彼:
As Film entered the room, the large soldier waiting inside lit up. She
seemed to remember his face.
あら？ もしかしてあなた、基地で働いてる方？: Oh? You work at the base, don't you?
覚えられていたことに、兵士は大げさに喜んでみせる。<br>しかし彼と話した記憶も:
The soldier exaggeratedly rejoiced that she remembered him. But Film
grew suspicious—she had never spoken to him.
……ねえ、誰かと間違えていない？<br>わざわざ、わたしなんて指名しないでしょう:
Hey, aren't you confusing me with someone else? You wouldn't go out
of your way to request a woman like me, would you?
だが兵士はずっとフィルムにあこがれていたと、強く訴える。<br>その瞳は強い情欲:
But the soldier insisted vehemently that he had always admired Film.
His eyes burned with intense lust.
わたしに……！？<br>で、でもわたしなんてお婆ちゃんなのに……: Me...!? B-but even though I'm just an old woman...
困惑するフィルムに、耐えかねたように兵士が迫る。:
Unable to restrain himself any longer, the soldier advanced on the
bewildered Film.
